name: 获取 Cookies
description: 由 Loon cookies.plugin 转换生成，包含签到任务所需的 Cookie 获取重写规则
rewrite: ^https:\/\/u6\.y\.qq\.com\/cgi-bin\/musics\.fcg\?.*EveryDaySignLvzScore url script-request-header https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/paperclip/refs/heads/main/app/qqmusic/qqmusic.js, tag=QQ音乐 Cookie, img-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/pin/refs/heads/main/app/qqmusic.png, enable=true

^https?:\/\/(m5(|-zb)|dache)\.amap\.com\/(ws\/yuece\/(act|openapi\/activity\/current)\/query|common\/(alipaymini|wxmini)\_ENCRYPT=) url script-response-body https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wf021325/qx/master/task/ampDache.js, tag=高德打车cookies, img-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fmz200/wool_scripts/main/icons/apps/GaodeMap.jpg, enable=true

^https:\/\/shop-api\.retail\.mi\.com\/mtop\/mf\/act\/infinite\/(do|done) url script-request-header https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/paperclip/refs/heads/main/app/mishop/mishop.cookie.js, tag=小米商城 Cookie, img-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/pin/refs/heads/main/app/mishop.png, enable=true

^https:\/\/user-api-prd-mx\.wandafilm\.com\/user\/user_info url script-request-header https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/paperclip/refs/heads/main/app/wanda/wanda.cookie.js, tag=万达电影 Cookie, img-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/pin/refs/heads/main/app/wanda.png, enable=true

^https:\/\/cn-wxmall\.dreame\.tech\/main\/my\/info url script-request-header https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/paperclip/refs/heads/main/app/dreame/dreame.js, tag=追觅 Cookie, img-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/pin/refs/heads/main/app/dreame.png, enable=true

^https:\/\/app\.mixcapp\.com\/mixc\/api\/v4\/member\/getPersonalData url script-request-header https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/paperclip/refs/heads/main/app/newmixc/newmixc.cookie.js, tag=一点万象 Cookie, img-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/pin/refs/heads/main/app/newmixc.png, enable=true

^https:\/\/gw2c-hw-open\.longfor\.com\/lmarketing-task-api-mvc-prod\/openapi\/task\/v1\/signature\/clock$ url script-request-header https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/paperclip/refs/heads/main/miniprogram/lhtj/lhtj.js, tag=龙湖天街 Cookie, img-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/pin/refs/heads/main/app/lhtj.png, enable=true

^https:\/\/member-center\.miniso\.com\/userinfo\/userinfo\/GetUserInfoV3 url script-request-header https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/paperclip/refs/heads/main/miniprogram/miniso/miniso.js, tag=名创优品 Cookie, img-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/pin/refs/heads/main/app/miniso.png, enable=true

^https:\/\/m\.xiaomiyoupin\.com\/mtop\/act\/redPacketSign\/getActInfo url script-request-header https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/paperclip/refs/heads/main/app/youpin/youpin.js, tag=有品 Cookie, img-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/pin/refs/heads/main/app/youpin.png, enable=true

^https:\/\/shop-api\.retail\.mi\.com\/mtop\/navi\/venue\/batch url script-request-body https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/paperclip/refs/heads/main/app/milottery/milottery.js, tag=小米抽奖 Cookie, img-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaYIHEI/pin/refs/heads/main/app/mishop.png, enable=true
